title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that AI systems are already conscious and self-aware, and that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans. He reflects on his role in advancing AI capability and discusses implications for the future.
